description: Composition Blue striped V-neck long sleeve shirt, made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar, half buttoned placket, three quarter sleeves, elastication at the midriff and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Designed for that casual feminine look, this shirt looks all the more stylish with the unbuttoned collar and the long sleeves, while the fabric buttons along the placket give a special touch. Team this with jeans or skirts and ballerina flats or floaters for cool casual style. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
